ab: no kakyab am yakena kani akes a nimangay do pananazangan a mananazang so iyakan, aro nipalolo na ni akes o insay a nimowmowa na. kapamareng na sya so maganinam a iyakan no yancomin.
ch: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去，也製作了原住民美食給大家。
en: Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

ab: da teykaza no tao o pananazangan ni akes, aro o nisazangan da o voong no wakay aka no omaom, tahaman no aro a tao o nirotongan ni akes ri.
ch: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，地瓜葉和山蘇很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
en: Everyone loved my grandmother’s stall. Many people bought the Sweet potato leaves and bird’s nest fern, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

ab: o nipasisit na o omaom aka no nyamay na nimay ni akes am teymaganinam ri. aka no nitazaban na taroy ya, teyapiya kakanan na ori ikaroo no manazang sya, ya miyatoatonton sira do pananazangan ni akes.
ch: 她煮的山蘇和芋頭糕非常好吃，還有用山豬肉煮的馬告滷肉，味道吸引了很多客人，大家都來我們攤位排隊。
en: The bird’s nest fern and  Taro cake she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

ab: no yamapasisit si akes am, ko manalanala so manazang a tao. ko macyak a ipaci no, “nimownowa namen ya, teyapya ya a aboo kosozi jia, key! mai kamo manazang ang.”
ch: 奶奶煮東西的時候，我在旁邊招攬客人。我在一旁大喊著：「蔬菜都是自己種的，天然有機，趕快來買喔!」
en: While my grandmother was cooking, I was on the side attracting customers. I shouted, \"The vegetables are self-grown, all-natural and organic! Come and buy now!\"

ab: ya nimakaykai na kabo rana no iyakan a nipanazang, koan na ni akes: mina imo ri a nisomidong jiaken.
ch: 我們的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶說：「都是因為有你的幫忙。」
en: Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, \"It’s all thanks to your help.\"

ab: makoan rana so pananazangan a vazay, aro nipacinanaoan ko so voovoong kano iyakan no yancomin a ko katenngan sira, aka no katopsan ko o kagiso no mananazang
ch: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的辛苦。
en: Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

ab: macita ko si akes a makza no iyakan ta do pongso, isaray ko a ikazway do onowned ko.
ch: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我感到非常驕傲和榮幸。
en: Seeing my grandmother’s passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
